text:
OlympiacosandFiorentinaare gearing up for the Europa Conference League final in Athens this evening.

West Hamare the current holdersafter beating Fiorentina in last year’s final but theItalianside are back for the second year in a row to fight for the trophy.

But a tough night awaits in the Greek capital against an Olympiacos side who impressively eliminatedPremier Leagueclub Aston Villa in the last four.

In recent years,BT Sport– which has since become TNT Sports – have made the major European club finals available to watch for free on theirYouTubechannel.

But will football fans have the same luxury this time around?

Find out if the 2024 Europa Conference League final – just the third to be played in history – will be shown live on YouTube by TNT Sports.

Metro's Head of Sport James Goldman delivers punchy analysis, transfer talk and his take on the week's biggest stories direct to your inbox every week.

Sign up here, it's an open goal.

Fiorentina vs West Ham will kick-off onWednesday, May 29 at 8pm BST.

The game is being held at the AEK Arena in Athens, Greece.

Unlike previous years, TNT Sports have confirmed that the Europa Conference League final 2024 will not be shown on YouTube in the UK.

Instead, fans can watch the Europa Conference League final for free on discovery+. All you need to do is register a free account on discovery+ without signing up to a package and you’ll be able to tune in to the game.

The live stream can be viewed across a range of devices from smartphones and tablets to laptops and smart TVs.

As well as the Europa Conference League final, the Champions League final (Saturday, June 1) will also be shown live and for free on discovery+.

TNT Sports customers will still be able to watch the Europa Conference League final on TV.

The match will be shown on TNT Sports 1 with live coverage starting from 7.30pm.

The Europa Conference League is a new competition with Italian club Roma winning the inaugural one in 2022 and West Ham coming out on top in 2023.

Olympiacos owner and president Evangelos Marinakis, who also owns Nottingham Forest, will certainly be hoping his Greek side lift this year’s trophy.

title: Is the Europa Conference League final 2024 on YouTube? How to watch Olympiacos vs Fiorentina for free | Football | Metro News
description: Find out if tonight's Olympiacos v Fiorentina Europa Conference League final will be shown live and free on TNT Sports' YouTube channel.
